Brand Monitor
June 28, 2026 | Daily Scan

Know where your brand is showing up

A lightweight public-source monitor for founders and small teams. It scans configured sources, dedupes mentions, scores signal, and turns the daily feed into a short action list.

Live sample configuration This report is generated from the checked-in brand and source config. Swap config/brands.json and config/sources.json to monitor your own market.
What

Daily mention scan

Tracks public mentions across configured feeds and search surfaces without requiring a paid enterprise suite.

Why

Less missed signal

Find launches, coverage, competitor comparisons, and high-signal posts before they disappear into the feed.

How

Filter, dedupe, score

Filters loose matches, removes repeat URLs, scores relevance, and publishes a static report for the team.

First check

Review high-signal mentions

No high-signal mentions crossed the highlight threshold in this scan.

Second check

Compare brand mix

Use the brand breakdown to see which configured names are generating attention today.

Third check

Update the config

Add competitors, products, exclusions, or source feeds when the log shows too much noise or misses expected coverage.

Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial 60

Product: ChatGPT

Jonathan Rinderknecht was facing arson charges for setting a fire on New Year's Day in 2025, which became one of the deadliest wildfires in LA history. To make their case, prosecutors turned to location data from his iPhone, security camera footage, and witness testimony. But they also turned to his ChatGPT logs. Prosecutors said that […]

Source: The Verge (Trade Publication) Published: 2026-06-28 Sentiment: neutral

Show HN: Decomp Academy – Learn to decompile GameCube games into matching C 60

Product: General

Over the past few months I've been heavily involved in the decompilation community. I've been hands-on decompiling a beloved game from my childhood (Star Fox Adventures). I started this journey with zero prior decomp experience—and to make things worse I had never really touched C nor assembly either.Learning how to decompile was challenging. It's difficult to find any good learning resources for

Source: Hacker News (Independent Review) Published: 2026-06-28 Sentiment: neutral
